title: Start
body:
<<place bedroom>>
{{MC}} Oh no Oh no I'm late!
{{MC}} What do I do?
[[Go to school without breakfast.|route_a_start]]
[[Have a rushed breakfast.|route_b_start]]

title: route_a_start
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
MC quickly gathers their things in their arms in a rush and runs to school.
MC lives in a dorm near their school so it shouldn't take them too long to get to class right?
It's now just one last corner to their class..
SFX: BAAM
<<screenshake 15>>
{{MC}} Aahh
Their things fall to the floor, scattering everywhere.
{{boy,speaking}} Sorry, are you ok?
{{MC}} I'm fine but my things fell everywhere.
{{boy}} Let me help you pick them up.
They quickly gather their papers and notebooks scattered everywhere.
{{boy,speaking}} Which class are you in? I'll help you bring these to your room.
{{MC}} Oh no, It's ok. I'm in room 468 you might be too late for your own class.
{{boy,speaking}} 468? We're classmates! Let's go quick our teacher is very strict on tardiness.
[[Hurry to class|late_arrival_a]]

title: route_b_start
body:
<<place bedroom>>
The MC quickly grabbed a breakfast of toasted bread from their pantry.
MC then grabs their bag and bolts out of their rented dorm.
<<place bus_stop>>
MC lives near the school so it shouldn't be a problem to get to school in time.
Just one last corner and they will be able to see their school gates.
<<screenshake 15>>
{{MC}} Aahh!
{{girl,nervous_speaking}} Bread!
{{girl,nervous_speaking}} Are you ok? Your bread fell.
{{MC}} I'm ok, but I don't have food for breakfast.
{{girl,speaking}} Don't worry, I'll buy you one. Let's go to a store.
<<place store>>
They both grab a small breakfast from the general store near the school.
{{MC}} Won't we be too late if we eat here?
{{girl,speaking}} It should be fine. We can just say we went to eat the teacher shouldn't get too mad about this.
{{girl,speaking}} What class are you in by the way?
{{MC}} I'm in class 468.
{{girl,speaking}} 468? We're classmates.
{{MC}} We should probably go now, the teacher might get angry if we're too late.
[[Hurry to class|late_arrival_b]]

title: late_arrival_a
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
They try their best to get to class on time.
Unfortunately they were still too late.
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} WHY WERE YOU LATE?
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} DO YOU EVEN KNOW WHAT TIME IS IT?
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} YOU ARE 10 MINUTES LATE!
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} GO STAND OUTSIDE THE CLASSROOM!
[[Stand outside...|aftermath_route_a]]

title: late_arrival_b
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
They try their best to get to class on time.
Unfortunately they were still too late.
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} WHY WERE YOU LATE?
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} DO YOU EVEN KNOW WHAT TIME IS IT?
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} YOU ARE 10 MINUTES LATE!
<<screenshake 10>>
{{Teacher}} GO STAND OUTSIDE THE CLASSROOM!
[[Stand outside...|aftermath_route_b]]

title: aftermath_route_a
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
{{boy,nervous_speaking}} The teacher didn't even let us explain, tsk.
Narrator: MC lets out a sigh, lamenting not waking up earlier.
{{boy,speaking}} At least by standing here I can let my stomach process the breakfast I had before leaving home.
{{MC}} I'm so hungry... I was rushing so fast I didn't get to eat anything.
{{boy}} That's rough. I'll share some of my snacks with you later.
Narrator: They did a bit of small talk, and somehow the other was able to get MC to open up a bit.
{{MC}} I want to see what else is there to do outside, but I'm scared of trying out new things.
{{boy}} Hmmm..
{{boy,speaking}} If you want you can come along with me to an obstacle course.
{{boy}} It's a place where you can experience going through obstacles, you will definitely be able to stretch out.
{{MC}} Would a place like that be welcoming to people like me?
{{MC}} I don't do any sort of exercise.
{{MC}} What if I don't pass the obstacle course?
{{MC}} If I get stuck in an obstacle? I would be a bother to other people there.
{{boy,speaking}} What are you saying?
{{boy,speaking}} It's an obstacle course, you're meant to get stuck at some point.
{{boy}} Even if you don't pass an obstacle it's ok.
{{boy}} There's people there whose job is to help people who get stuck.
{{boy,speaking}} You are not a bother.
[[End of Demo|end]]

title: aftermath_route_b
body:
<<place classroom_hallway>>
Narrator: Both of them gingerly held their heads down and stood outside of the room.
{{girl,speaking}} Do you want to sneak out and eat more?
{{MC}} Let's not, if the teacher notices he might call our parents.
{{girl, nervous_speaking}} Booo, it's so boring to stare at a school hallway.
{{MC}} If we skipped on that breakfast you bought me, we might not have been late.
{{girl}} Absolutely not, breakfast is the most important meal of the day. No regrets!
Narrator: They did a bit of small talk, and somehow the other was able to get MC to open up a bit.
{{MC}} I want to see what else is there to do outside, but I'm scared of trying out new things.
{{girl,speaking}} Do you want to come along with me to a museum?
{{MC}} What kind of museum?
{{girl,speaking}} I'm thinking either an art museum or a history museum.
{{MC}} I don't know anything about either of those topics.
{{MC}} I probably won't understand anything in there.
{{girl,speaking}} Hahaha, what are you thinking about?
{{girl}} No one there will ridicule you just because you don't understand anything.
{{girl,speaking}} It is a place for learning not a place being all pompous and stuff.
{{girl}} You are not a bother.
[[End of Demo|end]]
